content.body: Source URL doesn't necessarily need to be the source of identity, but Source Text only has its own problems, especially if a site isn't properly secured and can load arbitrary javascript. they could theoretically import a module with identical source text but its imports point to different locations.
If you have two files that both only contain `export const x = 1;`, would those compare identically?
content.formatted_body: If you have two files that both only contain export const x = 1;, would those compare identically?
